meaning: n.封铅,封条,印,图章,密封vt.封,密封n.海豹,海豹毛皮
examples: The letter bore the president's seal.
He broke the wax seal and unrolled the paper.
The leak was eventually traced to a broken seal.
And let patients decide, when they buy pills, whose seal of approval they want.
The cold and stiff o-rings at one joint didn't flex and seal as designed.
